zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wilson Reightley於1844年12月23日出生在美國俄亥俄州韋恩武斯特時，他的父親George Reighley28歲，母親Christena Routson20歲。他於大約1873年與Bridget Ann Nugent結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1885年住在美國明尼蘇達州賀伯特賀伯特 堂史普且於1900年住在美國明尼蘇達州賀伯特可洛 文 蕾克 堂史普。他去世於1908年1月19日在美國明尼蘇達州可洛 文享年63歲，埋葬在美國明尼蘇達州賀伯特斯特萊特 利維 堂史普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Wilson Reightley于1844年12月23日出生在美国俄亥俄州韋恩武斯特时，他的父亲George Reighley28岁，母亲Christena Routson20岁。他于大约1873年与Bridget Ann Nugent结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1885年住在美国明尼苏达州賀伯特賀伯特 堂史普且于1900年住在美国明尼苏达州賀伯特可洛 文 蕾克 堂史普。他去世于1908年1月19日在美国明尼苏达州可洛 文享年63岁，埋葬在美国明尼苏达州賀伯特斯特萊特 利維 堂史普。

nameMeanings.name: Reightley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gatlaoich, see Gately .

variants.name: Keighley
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so named in Yorkshire. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Cyhha + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of German Kiechle (see Kuechle ) or Kiechler (see Kuechler ).

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

nameMeanings.name: Wilson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a patronymic from   Will .  Use as a given name in the United States was inspired by President (Thomas) Woodrow Wilson (  1856–1924 );  compare the similar adoption as a given name of  Woodrow .

historicEvents.description: U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.
Historical Boundaries:  1857: Crow Wing, Minnesota Territory, United States 1858: Crow Wing, Minnesota, United States

historicEvents.title: The Dakota Conflict/War
historicEvents.description: The Dakota War was an armed conflict between the United States and several bands of Dakota Native Americans. It began along the Minnesota River four years after Minnesota was admitted as a state. The Dakota made attacks on hundreds of settlers, which resulted in their deaths. A military tribunal sentenced 303 Dakota men to death for their crimes but 264 of them were exonerated. The remaining 38 were apart of a mass hanging on December 26 that same year. It was the largest mass execution in United States history.
Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.

historicEvents.title: The Assassination of James Garfield
historicEvents.description: Garfield was shot twice by Charles J. Guitea at Railroad Station in Washington, D.C. on July 2, 1881. After eleven weeks of intensive and other care Garfield died in Elberon, New Jersey, the second of four presidents to be assassinated, following Abraham Lincoln.
Historical Boundaries: 1883: Hubbard, Minnesota, United States

historicEvents.title: The Minnesota State Flag
historicEvents.description: The Flag of Minnesota was adopted on August 2 and consists of scenes from the seal of Minnesota. The flag has been modified over the years to be easier to manufacture.
historicEvents.urlTitle: History of the Flag of Minnesota

historicEvents.title: Plessy vs. Ferguson
historicEvents.description: A landmark decision of the U.S. Supreme Court upholding the constitutionality of racial segregation laws for public facilities if the segregated facilities were equal in quality. It's widely regarded as one of the worst decisions in U.S. Supreme Court history.

en.lifeSummary: When John Wilson Reightley was born on 23 December 1844, in Wooster, Wayne, Ohio, United States, his father, George Reighley, was 28 and his mother, Christena Routson, was 20. He married Bridget Ann Nugent about 1873. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He lived in Hubbard Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, United States in 1885 and Crow Wing Lake Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, United States in 1900. He died on 19 January 1908, in Crow Wing, Minnesota, United States, at the age of 63, and was buried in Straight River Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Wilson Reightley est né le 23 décembre 1844, à Wooster, Wayne, Ohio, États-Unis, son père, George Reighley, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Christena Routson, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Bridget Ann Nugent environ 1873. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il a vécu à Hubbard Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, États-Unis en 1885 et à Crow Wing Lake Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, États-Unis en 1900. Il est décédé le 19 janvier 1908, à Crow Wing, Minnesota, États-Unis, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Straight River Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Wilson Reightley am 23. Dezember 1844 in Wooster, Wayne, Ohio, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Reighley 28 und seine Mutter Christena Routson 20. Er hat um 1873 Bridget Ann Nugent geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1885 hat er in Hubbard Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Vereinigte Staaten und 1900 in Crow Wing Lake Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 19. Januar 1908 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Crow Wing, Minnesota, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Straight River Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Wilson Reightley è nato il il 23 dicembre 1844 nel Wooster, Wayne, Ohio, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, George Reighley, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Christena Routson, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Bridget Ann Nugent circa 1873. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a Hubbard Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1885 e nel Crow Wing Lake Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1900. Morì il 19 gennaio 1908, nel Crow Wing, Minnesota, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Straight River Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.Crow Wing Lake, Badoura & Hubbard Townsh: アメリカ合衆国ミネソタ州ハバードクロー ウィング ラク トウンシュイップ
ja.Straight River Township, Hubbard, Minnes: アメリカ合衆国ミネソタ州ハバードストレイト リバー トウンシュイップ
ja.Wayne, Ohio, United States: アメリカ合衆国オハイオ州ワイン
ja.lifeSummary: John Wilson Reightleyが1844年12月23日にアメリカ合衆国オハイオ州ワインウスターで生まれた時，父George Reighleyは28歳，母Christena Routsonは20歳であった。約1873年にBridget Ann Nugentと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1885年にはアメリカ合衆国ミネソタ州ハバードハバード トウンシュイップに，1900年にはアメリカ合衆国ミネソタ州ハバードクロー ウィング ラク トウンシュイップに住んでいた。彼は1908年1月19日にアメリカ合衆国ミネソタ州クロー ウィングで63歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ミネソタ州ハバードストレイト リバー トウンシュイップにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Charles, Floyd, Iowa, United States: 미국 아이오와 주 플로이드 스트. 찰스 타운시프
ko.Manter, Hubbard, Minnesota: 미국 미네소타 주 후브바드 후브바드 타운시프
ko.Crow Wing Lake, Badoura & Hubbard Townsh: 미국 미네소타 주 후브바드 크로 윙 레이크 타운시프
ko.Straight River Township, Hubbard, Minnes: 미국 미네소타 주 후브바드 스트레이트 라이버 타운시프
ko.lifeSummary: John Wilson Reightley(이)가 1844년 12월 23일 미국 오하이오 주 웨이인 보스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Reighley(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Christena Routson(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1873년 Bridget Ann Nugent(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1885년도에 미국 미네소타 주 후브바드 후브바드 타운시프에서, 1900년도에 미국 미네소타 주 후브바드 크로 윙 레이크 타운시프에서 살았다. 그는 1908년 1월 19일 미국 미네소타 주 크로 윙에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 미네소타 주 후브바드 스트레이트 라이버 타운시프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Wilson Reightley nasceu em 23 de dezembro de 1844, em Wooster, Wayne, Ohio, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, George Reighley, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Christena Routson, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Bridget Ann Nugent aproximadamente 1873. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele viveu em Hubbard Township, Hubbard, Minesota, Estados Unidos da América em 1885 e em Crow Wing Lake Township, Hubbard, Minesota, Estados Unidos da América em 1900. Ele faleceu em 19 de janeiro de 1908, em Crow Wing, Minesota, Estados Unidos da América, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Straight River Township, Hubbard, Minesota, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Manter, Hubbard, Minnesota: хуббард тоуншип, хуббард, Миннесота, Соединенные штаты

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wilson Reightley родился 23 декабря 1844 г. в местности вустир, веин, Огайо, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени George Reighley было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Christena Routson, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Bridget Ann Nugent около 1873 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он жил в местности хуббард тоуншип, хуббард, Миннесота, Соединенные штаты в 1885 году и в местности кроу виг леик тоуншип, хуббард, Миннесота, Соединенные штаты в 1900 году. Он умер 19 января 1908 г. в местности кроу виг, Миннесота, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности стреиит ривир тоуншип, хуббард, Миннесота, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Wilson Reightley nació el 23 de diciembre de 1844, en Wooster, Wayne, Ohio, Estados Unidos, su papá, George Reighley, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Christena Routson, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Bridget Ann Nugent aproximadamente 1873. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Vivió en Hubbard Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Estados Unidos en 1885 y en Crow Wing Lake Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Estados Unidos en 1900. Murió el 19 de enero de 1908, en Crow Wing, Minnesota, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Straight River Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Estados Unidos.
